infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: This app uses location to track your journey and show your position on the map.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: This app uses location to track your journey and show your position on the map.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: This app uses location to track your journey and show your position on the map.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Wayfarian uses the camera so you can take photos during your journey.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Allow Wayfarian to access your photos to save and share journey memories.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Allow Wayfarian to access your photos to save and share journey memories.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Wayfarian uses the camera so you can take photos during your journey.
